nodeDID.description: The DID of the device being proposed for network membership

memberDID.description: Legacy alias for ownerDID. The durable wallet/member DID that owns the proposed device. Defaults to nodeDID for local-only joins.

ownerDID.description: The durable wallet/member DID that owns the proposed device. Defaults to nodeDID for local-only joins.

delegateDID.description: The local delegate/session DID that should receive wallet grants for this device, when distinct from nodeDID.

requestedBy.description: The DID that submitted the request, such as a wallet delegate or the node DID.

nodeProof.description: Base64url Ed25519 signature from nodeDID over the join or owner-access request statement.

requestKind.description: The enrollment path used by this request

networkRecordId.description: Requested network record ID, when the node already knows the target network

sourceDWN.description: The DWN endpoint where the device's authoritative records live (for cross-DWN scenarios)

label.description: Optional label for the proposed device

nodeKeyDelivery.description: Public key material used by the anchor to encrypt the delivered mesh context key to this node

rootKeyId.description: The node's root encryption key ID

x.description: Base64url-encoded X25519 public key derived for key delivery

kid.description: Optional key ID; rootKeyId is authoritative when present

preAuthKeyId.description: Record ID of the encrypted pre-auth key used for this request

preAuthProof.description: HMAC proof derived from the pre-auth key secret, network ID, and node DID

requestedAt.description: When the device requested to join
